description: You are a legal paralegal at a law firm that has just received a litigation hold notice for the case 'Meridian Corp v. Acme Industries' (Case No. 2025-CV-04891). Review the 'Litigation Hold Notice' document in the Projects workspace to determine the scope of documents to be preserved. For all in-scope documents, apply the tag 'legal-hold', add a comment stating 'Document placed under litigation hold per Case No. 2025-CV-04891. Do not modify, delete, or relocate.', and remove all access permissions for the user 'outside-counsel'. Create a collection named 'Litigation Hold - Meridian v Acme' containing all in-scope documents. Do not apply these actions to documents outside the stated scope. Login credentials: Administrator / Administrator
